title: Daylight v20 External Firewall Profile Review
description: Documentation schema for one external firewall-profile review inside an external evidence bundle. The enforced validator is src/external_evidence.py. A review is rejected if the reviewer identity contains a reserved token, the independence class is not 'external', it is fixture or not claim-usable, the scope is not exactly 'aperture-public-artifact-firewall-profile', it does not bind to the current profile digest (src/firewall_profile.py:profile_digest), the current rules digest (src/external_evidence.py:firewall_rules_digest), and the negative case matrix digest (src/external_evidence.py:firewall_negative_cases_digest), its finding level is critical or contradiction, or its pinned attestation is missing or inadmissible. The attestation subject_digest must equal SHA-256('DAYLIGHT-v20-EXTERNAL-FIREWALL-REVIEW:' + canonical(review without attestation_ref)).
